runtime_policy: repo-only fixture tests; launches only Python child processes for CLI coverage; does not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell, or visible windows
guard_policy: proves the short soak ladder is ordered, approval-gated, non-promoting, and keeps long/future lanes locked until prerequisite soak evidence exists
tests: hd_soak_short_tier_ladder passes as a repo-only plan while current short2 menu-idle is approval-gated and input-drift bounded
hd_soak_short_tier_ladder advances to short2 map-idle after a passing short2 menu-idle fixture
hd_soak_short_tier_ladder fails closed when a required harness route is missing
hd_soak_short_tier_ladder catches a mismatched first-step next-action command
hd_soak_short_tier_ladder CLI writes JSON/Markdown and respects --require-pass
